zh.Lindisfarne Castle, Kirkcudbright, South: 英國蘇格蘭吉德布萊次爾
zh.Kirkcudbright, Dumfries and Galloway, Sc: 英國蘇格蘭度福利斯 安德 加洛韋吉德布萊特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert De La Glenn, Earl of Balmuto於大約1303年出生在英國蘇格蘭度福利斯 安德 加洛韋吉德布萊特時，他的父親John Glen29歲，母親Betsy Abernathy25歲。他於1334年11月10日與Lady Margaret De Glen Countess of Balmuto, Princess of Scotland,在英國蘇格蘭吉德布萊次爾結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1345年在英國蘇格蘭費伏享年43歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭費伏。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert De La Glenn, Earl of Balmuto于大约1303年出生在英国苏格兰度福利斯 安德 加洛韋吉德布萊特时，他的父亲John Glen29岁，母亲Betsy Abernathy25岁。他于1334年11月10日与Lady Margaret De Glen Countess of Balmuto, Princess of Scotland,在英国苏格兰吉德布萊次爾结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1345年在英国苏格兰費伏享年43岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰費伏。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: La
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Glenn,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish (Derry and Galway): from Mag Fhloinn, see McGlynn .

variants.name: McGlynn
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Bridie, Colm, Declan, Donovan, Sean Patrick, Thomas Patrick.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mag Fhloinn, a patronymic from the personal name Flann ‘red, crimson’.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert De La Glenn, Earl of Balmuto was born about 1303, in Kirkcudbright, Dumfries and Galloway, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, John Glen, was 29 and his mother, Betsy Abernathy, was 25. He married Lady Margaret De Glen Countess of Balmuto, Princess of Scotland, on 10 November 1334, in Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1345, in Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 43, and was buried in Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.Kirkcudbright, Dumfries and Galloway, Sc: Kirkcudbright, Dumfries and Galloway, Écosse, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert De La Glenn, Earl of Balmuto est né environ 1303, à Kirkcudbright, Dumfries and Galloway, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Glen, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Betsy Abernathy, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Lady Margaret De Glen Countess of Balmuto, Princess of Scotland, le 10 novembre 1334, à Kirkcudbrightshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1345, à Fife, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterré à Fife, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.Kirkcudbright, Dumfries and Galloway, Sc: Kirkcudbright, Dumfries and Galloway, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Robert De La Glenn, Earl of Balmuto um 1303 in Kirkcudbright, Dumfries and Galloway, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Glen 29 und seine Mutter Betsy Abernathy 25. Er hat am 10. November 1334 in Kirkcudbrightshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Lady Margaret De Glen Countess of Balmuto, Princess of Scotland, geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1345 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Fife, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Fife, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

ko.Kirkcudbright, Dumfries and Galloway, Sc: 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리스 앤드 갈로아이 커kc드브라이트
ko.lifeSummary: Robert De La Glenn, Earl of Balmuto(이)가 대략 1303년 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리스 앤드 갈로아이 커kc드브라이트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Glen(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Betsy Abernathy(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1334년 11월 10일 영국 스코틀랜드 커kc드브라이츠히르에서 Lady Margaret De Glen Countess of Balmuto, Princess of Scotland,(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1345년 영국 스코틀랜드 피프에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 피프에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert De La Glenn, Earl of Balmuto nasceu aproximadamente 1303, em Kirkcudbright, Dumfries and Galloway, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Glen, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Betsy Abernathy, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Margaret De Glen Countess of Balmuto, Princess of Scotland, em 10 de novembro de 1334, em Kirkcudbrightshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. ru.Kirkcudbright, Dumfries and Galloway, Sc: кирккудбраит, думфриесь анд галлоуеи, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert De La Glenn, Earl of Balmuto родился около 1303 г. в местности кирккудбраит, думфриесь анд галлоуеи, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Glen было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Betsy Abernathy, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Margaret De Glen Countess of Balmuto, Princess of Scotland, 10 ноября 1334 г. в местности кирккудбраицхир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1345 г. в местности фиф, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 43 лет и был похоронен в местности фиф, Шотландия, Великобритания.
